name: Turkey and Stuffing Appetizer Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine milk and egg; beat well.
3. Stir in stuffing mix, celery, and mustard; blend well.
4. Add turkey; mix well.
5. Shape into 48 (1-inch) balls.
6. Place meatballs in an ungreased 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes or until meatballs are browned and no longer pink in the center.
8. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan, combine the last three ingredients; mix well.
9. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
10. Reduce heat to low; simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
11. Add meatballs to sauce; stir gently to coat.
12. Cook over medium heat for 5 to 10 minutes or until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally.
13. Serve in chafing dish or slow cooker.
